scripts.build:wasm: RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable cargo component build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release && mkdir -p dist && cp $(node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-artifact-path.mjs wasm32-wasip1/release/refarm_heartwood.wasm) dist/refarm_heartwood.wasm
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:transpile
scripts.test:integration: echo 'No integration tests for this crate'
